name: Enduring Undeath
description:
Release residual fragments of fallen souls at the target location, healing you and your allies for 2399 Health.

Consumes a corpse on cast to continue to heal you and your allies in the area for 2390 Health over 5 seconds. You can consume up to 5 additional corpses on cast, with each corpse extending the duration of the heal over time by 5 seconds.
